items.title: Register of Sasines Act 1829
items.description: An Act to explain and amend an Act of the Parliament of Scotland, intituled An Act concerning the registration of seisins and reversions of tenements within burgh.

items.title: Metropolitan Police Act 1829
items.description: An Act for improving the Police in and near the Metropolis.

items.title: Roman Catholic Relief Act 1829
items.description: An Act for the Relief of His Majesty’s Roman Catholic Subjects
